name: MapR5SubscriptionStatusForR4
title: Cross-version ConceptMap for ValueSet R5-subscription-status-for-R4 from FHIR R5 to FHIR R4
description: This ConceptMap represents the cross-version mapping of concepts from ValueSet `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/subscription-status|5.0.0` for use in FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/subscription-status|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/subscription-status|4.3.0` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/5.0/ConceptMap/R5-SubscriptionStatus-R4B-SubscriptionStatus` (`ConceptMap-R5-SubscriptionStatus-R4B-SubscriptionStatus.json`)
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/subscription-status|4.3.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/subscription-status|4.0.1` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/4.3/ConceptMap/R4B-SubscriptionStatus-R4-SubscriptionStatus` (`ConceptMap-R4B-SubscriptionStatus-R4-SubscriptionStatus.json`)
Applying explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/subscription-status|5.0.0#active` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/subscription-status|4.0.1#active` as Equivalent in `ConceptMap-R5-SubscriptionStatus-R4-SubscriptionStatus.json`, which results in Equivalent.
